_provenance.note: Owner-authored facility roster overrides resolving the infobox-filter AMBIGUOUS queue. force_facility promotes real processing facilities whose wiki page happens to use Infobox Activity/Location/none (a typing artifact, not doubt about facility-ness) — each confirmed by its Bucket:recipe.uses_skill + recipe pages. force_exclude documents ambiguous values that are NOT facilities. The 5 genuinely-uncertain values (Bank, Burners, Fishing Trawler, Tannery, Water) are LEFT in the coverage review queue for owner triage.

force_facility.reason: Smithing bar-smelting facility (10 recipes, uses_skill=Smithing; e.g. Adamantite bar); page is Infobox Activity (minigame), not Scenery
Cooking ale-brewing facility (40 recipes, uses_skill=Cooking; e.g. Asgarnian ale); page redirects to Brewing (Infobox Activity)
Prayer bone-offering altar / 3x XP (39 recipes, uses_skill=Prayer; e.g. Babydragon bones); page is Infobox Location
Firemaking/Prayer shade-cremation pyre (98 recipes, uses_skill=Firemaking,Prayer; e.g. Arctic pyre logs); page is Infobox Activity (minigame)
Runecraft tiara-making altar (uses_skill=Runecraft; Catalytic tiara); redirects to Runic altar (no standard infobox)
Runecraft tiara-making altar (uses_skill=Runecraft; Elemental tiara); redirects to Runic altar (no standard infobox)
Flour-making facility (Pot of flour, Pot of cornflour); skill-less service; page has no standard infobox
Fossil Island bone-enriching pool (25 recipes; e.g. Large enriched bone); skill-less; page is Infobox Location
Hide-tanning facility (8 recipes; e.g. dragon leathers); skill-less; owner-confirmed facility (page redirects to the Tanner NPC, but the tannery is a real processing station)
POH chapel incense burners (1 recipe, Firemaking; Marrentill); owner-confirmed facility; page is Infobox Room (Chapel)

force_exclude.reason: Arceuus spell (ashes->XP), not a physical facility; uses_skill=Magic,Prayer because it is cast

Malformed wiki pipe-link/anchor in the source value (a quest-specific object reference), not a clean facility page

Storage/utility interface that transforms nothing (the lone Rune pouch recipe is a banker-NPC redemption mis-tagged 'Bank'); the ontology's canonical utility non-example, not a processing station
A Fishing minigame (Infobox Activity); the raw manta ray / sea turtle are a timed-event reward, not output of a processing station (minigame + raw-source, both excluded categories)

A generic substance/source with no discrete clickable object (sinks/wells/pumps/fountains); filling grants no XP (the Herblore tag is downstream ingredient use). Underlying water-source objects belong to a future objects/resources slice
